content.en:
Soon.

Some Extreme Creatures appeared around, but they didn't do it immediately, but waited for other Extreme Creatures.

In a short period of time, the number of Extreme Dao creatures increased, and they also blocked this piece of void, unless the space of the Perfection Realm was extremely Dao, they could break the void and leave.

Obviously, these Extreme Dao creatures were going to besiege Ye Tian.

In their opinion, Ye Tianneng single-handedly entered the top ten of the killing list, and his strength must be extremely terrifying, and he could not be careless, so he had to go all out and give full play to the advantages of the Extreme Dao creatures, that is, quantity.

Killing Ye Tian with numbers, even if Ye Tian is just a clone of the will, there is no point in killing him, but after killing once, he can hit Ye Tian and cut off Ye Tian's hope of getting a great opportunity in the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm.

That's enough!

"It's already a hundred extreme creatures, and I haven't done it yet, so I'm so timid!"

Ye Tian smiled.

He is not in a hurry, there are more and more extreme creatures coming, and he also wants to know what level his current strength has reached, but unfortunately there has been no one to fight against.

If there are only a few Extreme Path creatures, there is no pressure on him, and the more Extreme Path creatures come, the better, so that he can show his strength.

Time passed slowly, and the number of extreme creatures gathered around them was still increasing.

If other super-level perfect controllers encounter such a thing, they are afraid that they will break through at the first time, and they will not give these extreme creatures a chance to gather numbers.

Distance.

The Lord of the Crows was puzzled: "It's strange, the Endless Lord of the End of the Realm didn't run away, he should be able to sense that there are more and more extreme creatures around him, right?"

"Maybe it's because he is very confident in his own strength, thinking that he is invincible, there are not many super-perfect controllers at the end of the realm, and they lack knowledge, plus they came to the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm with their will, thinking that they will not really die, so they are not worried. Another Extreme Dao creature said.

The Lord of the Ravens nodded, "That's right, we only have one life, but the cultivation path of the end of the realm has two lives, and they are not afraid of death." Sometimes, I really envy them!"

"What do you envy? That is, it doesn't matter if the will doppelganger is dead, if the ontology is dead, it is really dead, if the war starts, their ontology cannot avoid the war, once they are killed, they will really be killed. Moreover, if the end of the realm wants to cultivate to a super-level perfect controller, the probability is more than hundreds of millions of times lower than ours, and we can become a super-perfect controller when we become adults, and it is they who should be envied!" said another Extreme Dao creature.

"Hahahaha, yes, the life at the end of the realm is too fragile, and our starting point is the achievement that their countless beings can't achieve in the end. It's a pity that it is difficult for our Extreme Dao Creatures to achieve the Perfect Controller of the Extreme Realm, otherwise there would be no end of the realm!"

The Lord of the Ravens laughed wildly.

After another moment, eight hundred Extreme Dao creatures had gathered around.

The Extreme Mang Mountain Realm is very large, and there will not be many Extreme Dao creatures who are willing to come to besiege and kill Ye Tian, everyone is looking for resources, and the Extreme Dao creatures in the distance will not rush here.

With so many Extreme Dao creatures killing a super-perfect master, even if it really succeeds, it won't gain much benefit.

Although the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace gives a reward, how can so many Extreme Dao creatures be divided?

Therefore, most of the Extreme Dao creatures are still unwilling.

As a result, only 800 Extreme Creatures came.

But for these Extreme Dao creatures, wouldn't it be very easy for eight hundred Extreme Dao creatures to kill a super-perfect controller, there was no accident.

At this time, eight hundred Extreme Dao creatures began to approach.

"I thought you were going to dispatch tens of thousands of Extreme Creatures, but I didn't expect that there were only eight hundred Extreme Creatures, it seems that you still underestimate me!"

Ye Tian's voice spread throughout the four directions of time and space, and all the extreme creatures around him heard it.

"Arrogance, who do you think you are, and you still want to fight against thousands of extreme creatures with your own strength?

An Extreme Creature said coldly.

"Let's shoot!"

Ye Tian said.

These Extreme Dao creatures did not hesitate at all, they all knew that Ye Tian was very strong, and they had to go all out, otherwise it would be a shame to let Ye Tian escape.

Immediately.

Eight hundred Extreme Path creatures struck out in unison, as if they could destroy all the matter in this endless time and space in an instant, even if the perfect controller of the Void Realm faced their attack, I am afraid that they would have to suffer heavy damage.

That's when it happened.

Ye Tian's Endless Extreme Dao Perfect Ancestral Body erupted, and the terrifying aura made everything around him stagnate.

Then, a Gate Extreme Dao Control Technique appeared on Ye Tian's body, and these Extreme Dao Control Skills were blessed on his body, making his strength increase to a terrifying degree.

Many attacks bombarded Ye Tian's body, and he was directly defended.

They can't break through Ye Tian's defenses!

However, Ye Tian's casual blow directly killed more than a dozen Extreme Dao creatures.

Bang bang bang!!!

One Extreme Creature was bombarded and killed, like ants.

"Space-Time Extreme Dao Domain!"

In an instant, these Extreme Dao creatures fell into Ye Tian's Space-Time Extreme Dao Domain, which was a domain-like Extreme Dao Control Technique that was more powerful than the Time Extreme Dao Domain.

Therefore, it is a little difficult for them to escape.

So, they can only fight.

"How can you be so powerful?"

All the Extreme Creatures were stunned.

Is this a super-perfect master? Ordinary Realm-perfect controllers are not so terrifying, right?

At this moment, Ye Tian made another move.

"Extreme Path Rift Blade!"

With a single blow, the light of the Broken Blade tore through the body of a famous creature, as if it had slashed out hundreds of millions of Broken Blade Light in an instant.

No matter which Extreme Dao Creature, even if it was the top super-level Perfect Controller Extreme Dao Creature, they couldn't stop Ye Tian's casual blow.

In an instant, hundreds of Extreme Dao creatures fell.

Weak!

It's too weak!

They seemed to be a big realm away from Ye Tian, and in Ye Tian's eyes, they were really like ants.

Then.

An Extreme Creature came out armed with a broken Extreme Treasure Spear.

He burned the Extreme Dao bloodline, activated all the Extreme Dao Origin of the Extreme Dao Treasure, and burst out with a blow that surpassed his own peak, and he could only explode this blow.

Under one blow, he will have little combat power.

"Blood Peng Dao Spear Technique, Kill!"

Under this blow, the extreme path shattered, and all the rules were torn apart.

If a weaker Realm Perfect Controller is here, facing this blow, there may be a risk of falling.

The Extreme Creature who shot was the Lord of Blood Peng, who was currently ranked thirty-sixth on the killing list!

However.

Facing the killer move of the Lord of the Blood Peng, Ye Tianyi pointed out, and many extreme powers converged in this finger - Ten Thousand Dao Extreme Fingers!

This is also an extreme control technique of Ye Tian.

Ye Tian created too many Extreme Dao Control Techniques, so he was casually an Extreme Dao Control Technique.

And Ye Tian's finger gathered too much extreme power, which was far from being comparable to Xue Peng's master.
